Frequently Asked Questions

Are White Knight Chocolate Mint Chews still being made?
White Knight chocolate has been discontinued by the manufacturer, but you can still find nostalgic alternatives like White Knights Chocolate Mint Chews through specialty Australian candy retailers like Sweets World. These products capture the original flavour many Australians remember from their childhood.
Where can I buy White Knight chocolate in Australia online?
You can purchase White Knight chocolate products online through Sweets World (sweetsworld.com.au), which stocks discontinued and hard-to-find Australian chocolate bars. Online ordering gives you access to a wider range than most physical shops and allows you to compare prices and stock availability before purchasing.
How much does White Knight Chocolate Mint Chews cost?
White Knights Chocolate Mint Chews are priced at $6.99 for a 120g pack at Sweets World. This price reflects the nostalgia factor and availability of this discontinued product through specialty retailers.
What should I check before ordering White Knight chocolate online?
Before ordering, check stock availability to ensure the product isn't out of stock, verify the pack size matches what you need, review the product description to confirm it's the exact variety you're looking for, and check delivery timeframes for your location in Australia.
What are alternatives if White Knight chocolate is out of stock?
If White Knight chocolate products are unavailable, Sweets World offers similar nostalgic Australian chocolate options and mint-flavoured chocolate alternatives. The 'You may also want to buy' section on the product page suggests complementary chocolates that might appeal to fans of classic Australian confectionery.
